channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Next phase of Iran war ‘will be even more punishing’: Rubio, Trump officials brief Congress
item.description: Members of Congress demanded briefings from the White House after attacks were launched on Iran over the weekend.

item.title: Five races to watch on the day the 2026 midterm elections kick off
item.description: Results from Tuesday's races in three states could be telling for how the rest of the midterm season will unfold.

item.title: Supreme Court bars redrawing only Republican-held NYC congressional district for 2026 election
item.description: The Supreme Court ruling is a potentially significant one for Republicans, who are trying to retain their majorities in both chambers of Congress.

item.title: The smartest money moves to make as the Iran conflict rattles markets
Iran war live updates: Israel bolsters forces in southern Lebanon, drones hit U.S. embassy in Riyadh as oil rises further; dollar strengthens
item.description: Follow the latest news after the U.S. and Israel launched a massive attack on Iran that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: South Korean stocks slump as hot market re-opens after attack on Iran
U.S. embassy in Riyadh hit by drones
item.description: This was CNBC's live coverage of the U.S.-Israel strikes in Iran on March 2.

item.title: MongoDB's stock sinks after earnings, signaling more woes for software sector
Dow futures now down over 800 points ahead of the open
HBO Max, Paramount+ will become one streaming service. What that means for you.
